title: ageratina contorta
intro: Ageratina contorta, also known as twisted ageratina or twisted snakeroot, is a plant species within the mint family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like phenolic acids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Ageratina contorta include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Ageratina contorta can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
